subject: An abstract, expressionistic portrait of a humanoid head in profile facing down-left, eyes shut or downcast, with a swirling halo of pale ghostly script, tendrils, and looping calligraphic marks wrapped around the crown of the head. The figure appears overwhelmed or subdued; their features are obscured by aggressive painterly brushwork. The composition is dominated by deep indigo, violet, and magenta with white intrusive script.
description: A loose, painterly, almost graffiti-style composition rendered in heavy brushwork. A humanoid face appears in profile in the lower-center, head tilted down and to the left, features rendered in cool grey-blue with rough strokes that obscure detail. Around the crown of the head, white ribbons of calligraphic script swirl and loop in a halo, suggesting whispered words or an invasive thought. The script extends upward and outward into the violet field above. Dark streaks of indigo and black on the right side suggest a looming presence or shadow encroaching on the figure. Magenta and pink slashes accent the composition.
foreground: humanoid head in profile, overwhelmed expression, encircled by ghostly script
background: abstract violet and indigo field with intrusive white calligraphic marks and shadow tendrils
